prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年四川大学在北京市综合类最低位次依次为5237→5530→5895→6380→6896，连续5年持续后移，累计后移约1659名；近3年（2023–2025）累计后移约1001名，后移速度有所加快；2025年基准位次约6896名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021年116人、2022年110人、2023年105人、2024年100人、2025年130人（较上年大幅扩招30人）；2026年计划108人，较2025年缩减22人（缩幅约16.9%），名额明显收紧，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第11–16名区间（2026年第16名），稳居全国顶尖高校行列，综合实力雄厚；2026年高考周期声誉评价为"明显负面"，涉及学术不端（王竹卿事件等）、师德师风等51条负面舆情，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第35位（较热），校园生活类内容曝光尚可，但负面舆情未在短视频平台大规模传播；2022–2023年曾出现投档线下降信号，2024–2025年已无投档异常记录，负面影响正在消退；第五轮学科评估中，口腔医学、中国语言文学、护理学获评A+，临床医学、化学、数学、生物学、药学、软件工程、轻工技术与工程、马克思主义理论、中国史获评A，另有化学工程与技术、材料科学与工程、水利工程、法学、管理科学与工程、考古学、计算机科学与技术获评A-；A-及以上学科共19个，医学、文史、理工均衡发展，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学、口腔医学等专业社会热度持续偏高，与川大优势学科高度契合；本省考生总数2021年42037人→2025年65434人→2026年84900人，2026年较2025年增幅约29.7%，竞争环境显著加剧；四川大学位于四川省成都市，距北京市较远，属于跨省就读；北京考生对京外985高校的报考意愿受地域偏好影响，但川大作为顶尖综合性大学，跨省吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划较2025年明显缩减（130→108）、本省考生总数大幅增加（+29.7%）三重因素，竞争加剧是主要方向，位次应较2025年有所前移；但2026年声誉负面舆情（王竹卿事件等）可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制，部分抵消竞争加剧效应。，考虑考生人数激增和缩招的竞争加剧效应，小幅前移50名；预测最低位次约6146名，区间5646–6646名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 口腔医学（八年制）
- 临床医学（八年制）
- 计算机类（含双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（含双学士学位）
- 法学
- 电子信息类
- 网络空间安全（含双学士学位）
- 电气类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（绿色城市与智慧建造）
- 公共卫生与预防医学类
- 公共管理类
- 外国语言文学类（含双学士学位）
- 化学类。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5646–6646名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<5646名）可重点冲刺口腔医学、临床医学等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>6646名）建议以三档保底专业为主，争取二档中等专业。川大医学类（口腔、临床）录取位次远低于校线，需单独关注专业组位次。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Sichuan University in Beijing's comprehensive category were 5237 → 5530 → 5895 → 6380 → 6896, continuously shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 1659 places; in the last 3 years (2023–2025), the cumulative shift was about 1001 places, with the rate of backward shift accelerating; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 6896; the enrollment plan for Sichuan University in Beijing's comprehensive category was 116 in 2021, 110 in 2022, 105 in 2023, 100 in 2024, and 130 in 2025 (a significant expansion of 30 students compared to the previous year); the 2026 plan is 108 students, a reduction of 22 students from 2025 (a decrease of about 16.9%), with quotas clearly tightening and competition intensifying.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 11th–16th range in recent years (16th in 2026), firmly among the top universities in the country with strong comprehensive strength; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', involving 51 negative public opinion items such as academic misconduct (Wang Zhuqing incident, etc.) and teacher ethics, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 35th (relatively hot), with campus life content exposure being acceptable, but negative public opinion has not spread widely on short video platforms; from 2022–2023, there were signals of a decline in admission cutoff scores, but no abnormal admission records from 2024–2025, indicating the negative impact is fading; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Stomatology, Chinese Language and Literature, and Nursing were rated A+, Clinical Medicine, Chemistry, Mathematics, Biology, Pharmacy, Software Engineering, Light Industry Technology and Engineering, Marxist Theory, and Chinese History were rated A, and Chemical Engineering and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Water Conservancy Engineering, Law, Management Science and Engineering, Archaeology, and Computer Science and Technology were rated A-; there are 19 disciplines rated A- or above, with balanced development in medicine, humanities, and science and engineering, highlighting strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology have consistently high social popularity, which aligns well with Sichuan University's advantageous disciplines; the total number of local candidates in the province was 42,037 in 2021 → 65,434 in 2025 → 84,900 in 2026, with an increase of about 29.7% from 2025 to 2026, significantly intensifying the competitive environment; Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, far from Beijing, making it an out-of-province study destination; Beijing candidates' willingness to apply to 985 universities outside Beijing is influenced by regional preferences, but as a top comprehensive university, Sichuan University has strong cross-provincial appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three factors of the continuous backward shift in historical rankings, the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan compared to 2025 (130→108), and the substantial increase in the number of local candidates (+29.7%), the main direction is intensified competition, with rankings expected to shift forward compared to 2025; however, the negative reputation public opinion in 2026 (Wang Zhuqing incident, etc.) may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply, partially offsetting the competition intensification effect. Considering the competition intensification effect of the surge in candidate numbers and enrollment reduction, a slight forward shift of 50 places is predicted; the predicted minimum ranking is about 6146, with a range of 5646–6646.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Stomatology (Eight-Year Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program)
- Computer Science (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree Programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree Programs)
- Law
- Electronic Information
- Cyberspace Security (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree Programs)
- Electrical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Green City and Smart Construction)
- Public Health and Preventive Medicine
- Public Administration
- Foreign Languages and Literature (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree Programs)
- Chemistry.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5646–6646, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5646), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors like Stomatology and Clinical Medicine; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>6646), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors and strive for Tier 2 moderate majors. The admission rankings for Sichuan University's medical majors (Stomatology, Clinical Medicine) are far below the school's cutoff line, so you need to pay separate attention to the major group rankings.
